data.name: EstablishmentsError.EstablishmentCreationFailed
data.value: An error occurred while creating the establishment.

data.name: EstablishmentsError.OperatorCreationFailed
data.value: An error occurred while creating the operator.

data.name: EstablishmentsError.EstablishmentUpdateFailed
data.value: An error occurred while updating the establishment.

data.name: EstablishmentsError.OperatorUpdateFailed
data.value: An error occurred while updating the operator.
